content: One paper has been accepted by **ISPRS Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing (ISPRS J P&RS)**.
content_zh: 一篇论文被 **ISPRS摄影测量与遥感杂志 (ISPRS J P&RS)** 录用。

content: One paper has been accepted by **IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium (IGARSS 2026)**.
content_zh: 一篇论文被 **IEEE国际地球科学与遥感会议 (IGARSS 2026)** 录用。

content: One co-authored paper has been accepted by **International Society for Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing Congress (ISPRS 2026)**.
content_zh: 一篇合作论文被 **国际摄影测量与遥感学会大会 (ISPRS 2026)** 录用。

content: I began my **Master**'s degree studies at **Wuhan University**.
content_zh: 我开始在**武汉大学**攻读**硕士**学位。

content: One paper has been accepted by **IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing (TGRS)**.
content_zh: 一篇论文被 **IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing (TGRS)** 录用。

content: Our work "**_Image-text mutual retrieval method based on large-scale pre-training CLIP model fine-tuning_**" won the **Grand Prize (Top 0.1%)** and **20,000 RMB** cash in the **12th "Teddy Cup" Data Mining Challenge** [[link]](https://www.tipdm.org/dsej12/2429.jhtml).
content_zh: 我们的作品 "**_基于大规模预训练CLIP模型微调的图文互检索方法_**" 在第12届**“泰迪杯”数据挖掘挑战赛**中获得**特等奖 (Top 0.1%)** 及 **2万元**奖金 [[link]](https://www.tipdm.org/dsej12/2429.jhtml)。
